step_by_step_thinking: Agree. One additional point is that the pathophysiology and immune responses triggered by these parasitic larvae contribute significantly to tissue damage and chronic inflammation, which can be critical in diagnosing and treating hydatid disease.
raw_response:
Agree. One additional point is that the pathophysiology and immune responses triggered by these parasitic larvae contribute significantly to tissue damage and chronic inflammation, which can be critical in diagnosing and treating hydatid disease. Therefore, confirming it as parasitic helps tailor more precise medical management plans.

Answer Choice: A.
